economic_notes: Nation invested in Centex ($3,698,528) and a Cannabis Store ($147,023). Also holds minority investments in BATC Investments Ltd. and Miskisiw Oilfield Services Ltd. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with unknown impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Five entities consolidated: Administration, Education Inc., Housing Authority, Eagle Hills Daycare Centre Inc., and Developments GP Corporation. Net debt position of $20,246,765. Large increase in long-term debt from $9.4M to $18.4M due to new FNFA loans. Significant new investments in Centex ($3.7M) and Cannabis Store ($147K). Capital projects segment includes $7.3M in TCA additions. No schedule of remuneration provided. Community and Economic Development segment includes commercial operations. Battle River Treaty 6 Health Centre Inc. revenue of $270,275 appears in prior year but not current year revenue lines.
